mapper.select: SELECT C.contract_id, C.customer_id, CU.name, CU.birth_date, CU.GENDER, C.product_id as "productNo", I.productName, I.category as "productCategory", C.reg_date, C.expired_date, C.update_date, C.premium_amount, C.payment_cycle, C.contract_status FROM shez_contracts C JOIN SHEZ_INSURANCES I ON C.product_id= I.productNo JOIN shez_customers CU ON CU.customer_id = C.customer_id ORDER BY C.contract_id ASC
SELECT payment_id, contract_id, payment_date, due_date, amount, status FROM shez_payments
SELECT claim_id, contract_id, claim_date, claim_amount, paid_at, paid_amount, status FROM shez_claims
